# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

The following table lists the versions of Taskly that are currently being supported with security updates.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| v0.x.x  | :white_check_mark: |
| < v0.1  | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.

If you believe you have found a security vulnerability in Taskly, please report it to the maintainers privately. You can reach out directly via email to the repository owner or use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting feature if enabled.

**Please include the following details with your report:**
* A description of the vulnerability and its impact.
* Detailed steps to reproduce the issue.
* Any possible proof of concept (PoC) or exploitation code.
* Potential remediation suggestions (if you have them).

We take all security issues seriously and will respond to reported vulnerabilities as quickly as possible. We aim to:
1. Acknowledge receipt of your vulnerability report within 48 hours.
2. Provide an estimated timeline for the fix.
3. Notify you when the vulnerability has been patched.
